subject: Sociology
title: Social Media and Society
description: A fast breakdown of Social Media and Society for builders.

hook.text: Three billion people use social media daily. We connected the world and can't agree on whether that's good.

buildup.text: Social media transformed how people communicate, organize, consume news, and construct their identities.

discovery.text: Platforms create echo chambers where people mainly encounter views they already hold, deepening polarization.

twist.text: Social media also empowered movements: Arab Spring, Black Lives Matter, and MeToo all organized through platforms.

climax.text: Social media is neither savior nor villain. It amplifies whatever society already is — including its inequalities.

quiz.question: What are echo chambers in social media?
options: Environments where people mainly encounter views they already hold
